caseStudies.title: Meta Business Suite Phishing Campaign
caseStudies.summary: Identified and investigated a sophisticated phishing campaign impersonating Meta Business Suite. Performed full infrastructure analysis, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and initiated takedown procedures.
highlights: Domain registered just 17 days prior — rapid deployment pattern
Cloudflare + Next.js infrastructure mimicking legitimate Meta services
Multi-stage credential harvesting targeting business account admins
Full MITRE ATT&CK mapping across Reconnaissance, Resource Development, Initial Access, and Collection tactics
